data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY (Conflicting xG/PPG, significant missing data).
REASON: Fortaleza's high PPG (2.6) contrasts with América Mineiro's higher xG (1.67 vs 1.51). Overall data incompleteness (standings, H2H, model, O2.5/BTTS odds) reduces confidence. However, First Half Over 0.5 shows an exceptionally high 90% potential.
CONCLUSION: First Half Over 0.5.
